steps.title: Substitute the value x = 2
steps.content: We start with $$30x+15y=150$$. Substituting $x=2$ gives $$30(2)+15y=150$$. Simplify the product: $$60+15y=150$$.

steps.title: Solve for y
steps.content: From $$60+15y=150$$, subtract 60 from both sides: $$15y=90$$. Divide both sides by 15: $$y=6$$. Therefore, Priya purchased 6 hats, and the substituted equation checks because $60+15(6)=150$. B is correct.
